rows.label: tev056801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev056801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Walolo about the caravan.

rows.label: tev056801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev056801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Walolo if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev056801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Walolo about the caravan.

rows.label: tev056801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Walolo about the caravan.

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Step right up, friend! Nobody
beats Bubu Bazaar! Today is
discount day. Buy now and save big![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Bazaar stocks lots of rare items from
across Mira. Friend should take good look![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Aha! Walolo see greedy glint in
eye of friend. Friend is definitely
interested in making purchase.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Might Walolo suggest special angel gelatin?
It is most popular item here, made with 100
percent real godmelon and lava mango.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0008
rows.name: Why Bubu always have to smother Lana?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Lana never have any time for
self. Walolo feel so bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Of course, Walolo not saying
Bubu is clingy, awful husband
or anything like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0011
rows.name:
And Walolo certainly not sneaking off and meeting
Lana at night while Lana pour heart out to Walolo!
Friend better not get any funny ideas...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0040
rows.name:
Step right up, friend! Nobody
beats Bubu Bazaar! Today is
discount day. Buy now and save big![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0041
rows.name:
Might Walolo suggest special angel gelatin?
It is most popular item here, made with 100
percent real godmelon and lava mango.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0042
rows.name:
This VERY special dessert made with
love by biggest sweetheart of caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0043
rows.name:
It every bit as sweet and jiggly as her!
Friend should buy two dozen at least.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0048
rows.name:
Step right up, friend! How about some angel
gelatin? It is most popular item here, made
with 100 percent real godmelon and lava mango![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0049
rows.name:
Bubu should tell customers that
Lana make tarts. That would
make them fly off shelves![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0050
rows.name:
Dessert is called "angel" gelatin, but
tarts are actually made by old grannypon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0051
rows.name:
Er, but grannypon could croak
any minute, so "angel" part not
necessarily false advertising.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Walolo what he will do now.

rows.label: tev056801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Walolo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0012
rows.name:
This place is super toasty, but not enough
to warm cold, empty heart of Walolo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Maybe Walolo should jump into hot
springs and turn into Nopon meatball.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Wait, what if GIRLS
are at hot spring?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0015
rows.name: Nopon meatball it is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Walolo very grateful to friend
for exposing lie of Lana.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0020
rows.name:
If friend not point out that Lana give
birth to stuffed animal, Walolo might have
end up at mercy of crazy control freak![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0021
rows.name:
Just thinking about it makes
fur of Walolo stand on end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0022
rows.name:
*sigh* Suddenly Walolo
feel sorry for Bubu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Lana going to suck life force
right out of Bubu before this
all over. Friend just watch![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_SEL2011
rows.name:
Ask Walolo how the
child-rearing is going.

rows.label: tev056801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Walolo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0024
rows.name:
See hot spring over there? That
where Walolo decide to give
littlepon very first bath.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0025
rows.name:
Honestly, it was only when Walolo hold
soggy and suddenly heavier littlepon in
arms that wonders of dadaponhood hit home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0026
rows.name:
True, littlepon smell like rotten eggs now. But
minerals in hot spring very healthy! Walolo
going to swim there with family all the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0031
rows.name:
On closer inspection, littlepon
is spitting image of dadapon,
Walolo. Does friend agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0032
rows.name:
Littlepon so darling and cute! Walolo
going to work hard on upbringing and
make sure littlepon turn out perfect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0033
rows.name:
Walolo must dedicate whole life to making
Lana and littlepon happy as can be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0034
rows.name:
But, uh, maybe friend can find way
to break this news gently to Bubu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0035
rows.name:
Walolo good at making messes, but not
very fond of cleaning messes up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0036
rows.name:
Bubu should stop smothering Lana. Lana
get yelled at anytime she wander off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0037
rows.name:
Such shamefulness. Kind Walolo would
never tell poor Lana how to live life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056801_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Huh? MEH! Friend better not
tell Bubu that Walolo sneak off
and listen to Lana pour heart out![ST:wait ]
